scripts.check:compatibility: npm run check:schema && npm run check:provider-contracts
scripts.release:check: npm run check:syntax && npm run check:capabilities && npm run check:docs-sync && npm run check:compatibility && npm test && pnpm -r --if-present run build && pnpm -r --if-present run typecheck
scripts.link:cli: NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 corepack pnpm --filter @runfabric/core --filter @runfabric/planner --filter @runfabric/builder --filter @runfabric/runtime-node --filter @runfabric/cli --if-present run build && PNPM_HOME="${PNPM_HOME:-${HOME:-$PWD}/.pnpm}" && mkdir -p "$PNPM_HOME" && export PNPM_HOME && export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH" && NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 corepack pnpm -r --filter @runfabric/cli exec pnpm link --global --global-dir "$PNPM_HOME/global" --config.global-bin-dir="$PNPM_HOME"
scripts.unlink:cli: PNPM_HOME="${PNPM_HOME:-${HOME:-$PWD}/.pnpm}" && export PNPM_HOME && export PATH="$PNPM_HOME:$PATH" && NODE_NO_WARNINGS=1 corepack pnpm -r --filter @runfabric/cli exec pnpm unlink --global --global-dir "$PNPM_HOME/global" --config.global-bin-dir="$PNPM_HOME"
